title: Sarh Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sarh, with a Z-Score of +3.34. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Sarh has resulted in a score of 10.0 out of 10, indicating a highly anomalous event. 
 The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.7 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, with a moderate wind speed of 11.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Sarh.
